routes.aiUnifiedAICenter: 统一 AI 能力中心

qwen-image: Include subject, scene, and style elements
Use commas to separate multiple descriptions
doubao-image: Clear and concise descriptions work best
jimeng-image: Add professional terms like lighting and composition
kling-video: Focus on describing actions and changes

analysis.promptTooShort: Prompt too short, lacking necessary description
analysis.addMoreDetails: Add more details, such as subject features, scene, style, etc.
analysis.promptTooLong: Prompt too long, may affect generation quality
analysis.videoNeedsAction: Video generation requires describing actions or changes
analysis.addStyle: Adding style description can achieve more consistent results
analysis.addQuality: Adding quality keywords can improve generation quality
